findings.location: s2 — コード例（Shift_JIS文字シーケンスのダウンロード）
findings.description:
The source code example contains three res.write() data lines: "0000001, nabla
", "0000002, arch
", and "0000003, arch
". The knowledge file omits the last two lines, leaving only the first data row before res.setContentDisposition(). The code is structurally correct but is not a faithful extraction of the source example.
findings.source_evidence:
Source lines: `res.write("0000001, nabla
");` / `res.write("0000002, arch
");` / `res.write("0000003, arch
");` — knowledge file s2 only includes the first.
